creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
> FreeImage/J2KHelper.cpp:24:10: fatal error: 'openjpeg.h' file not found

Uh, sorry, pkgconfig is required for building -- just add "pkgconfig" into the "USES" line -- I don't want to post a whole new diff just for this :-)

> imv starts crashing with this update when trying to open some JPEGs.

Investigating... BTW, imv itself would not build for me here:

cc -c -O2 -pipe -march=core2  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -std=c99 -I/opt/include/SDL2 -I/opt/include/directfb -D_REENTRANT -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -DIMV_VERSION=\""v2.1.3"\" -o build/loader.o src/loader.c
1 error generated.
In file included from src/viewport.c:18:
src/viewport.h:21:10: fatal error: 'SDL2/SDL.h' file not found
#include <SDL2/SDL.h>

The file exists:

-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  4101 Mar 15 14:07 /opt/include/SDL2/SDL.h

but ${LOCALBASE}/include is not in compiler's include-path for some reason...
